description_long: This cabin features a modern A-frame design with a steeply pitched roof extending nearly to the ground, creating a dramatic triangular silhouette. The exterior is clad in dark panels, contrasted by natural wood framing that outlines the roof and supports the structure. Large glass windows and doors dominate the front and rear facades, allowing ample natural light to enter the interior and providing views to the outside. The side elevations are more solid, with a series of rectangular windows of varying sizes and a single small window on one side. A wooden deck wraps around the front and one side, with a circular outdoor seating area visible near the entrance. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, blending minimalist lines with warm, natural materials.
description: A modern A-frame cabin with dark panel siding, extensive wood framing, large glass windows, and a wraparound deck with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from the narrow gable end, highlighting the steep roof, wood framing, and partial view of the front deck.
description_view_1: This side view shows the solid dark panel wall with three rectangular windows and a glimpse of the deck and circular seating area.
description_view_2: The opposite gable end reveals a large glass facade, the main entrance, and a circular seating area on the deck.
description_view_3: The other side view displays a mostly solid wall with a single small window and the wood framing extending along the roofline.
attribute_roof_type: A-frame with steep pitch, continuous wood framing, and dark panel roofing
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with large glass panels on the front and rear facades, three rectangular windows of varying sizes on one side, and a single small window on the opposite side
attribute_door_placement: Single main entrance door centered on the front facade, integrated with the large glass panel
